CustomField.formula: (IF(CONTAINS(UPPER(Title), "VP"), 30, IF(CONTAINS(UPPER(Title), "DIRECTOR"), 25, IF(CONTAINS(UPPER(Title), "MANAGER"), 15, 0))) ) + (IF(ISPICKVAL(Industry, "Technology"), 25, IF(ISPICKVAL(Industry, "Manufacturing"), 20, IF(ISPICKVAL(Industry, "Financial Services"), 20, 5))) ) + (IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Phone)), 10, 0)) + (IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Company)), 10, 0)) + (IF(ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, "Web"), 15, IF(ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, "Partner Referral"), 15, 0)) )
CustomField.label: Lead Score
